{{CharacterNav}}
{{#lst:<%= it.pageTitle %>/source|seo}}
{{#lst:<%= it.pageTitle %>/source|infobox}}
<% if (it.hasSkillTree) { %>
== Skill Tree ==
<% if (it.hasSkillTreeImage) { -%>
{{#lst:<%= it.pageTitle %>/source|skill_tree_map}}

<% } -%>
{{#lst:<%= it.pageTitle %>/source|skill_tree}}
<% } -%>
<% if (it.upgradesSection) { %>
== Upgrades ==
{{#lst:<%= it.pageTitle %>/source|upgrades}}
<% } -%>
<% if (it.hasDropOnlyUpgrades) { %>
== Drop-only Upgrades ==
{{#lst:<%= it.pageTitle %>/source|drop_only_upgrades}}
<% } -%>
<% if (it.hasSkins) { %>
== Skins ==
{{#lst:<%= it.pageTitle %>/source|skins}}
<% } -%>
<% if (it.hasQuips) { %>
== Quips ==
{{#lst:<%= it.pageTitle %>/source|quips}}
<% } -%>

{{#lst:<%= it.pageTitle %>/source|categories}}
